title: Digital Soil Mapping — Northern Kazakhstan: Code & Models
description:
Source code for digital soil mapping in the steppe zone of Northern Kazakhstan (Kostanay Region).

Predicts six agrochemical soil properties (pH, SOC, NO₃, P₂O₅, K₂O, S) from multimodal satellite imagery (Sentinel-2, Landsat-8, Sentinel-1, SRTM DEM, ERA5-Land) using 11 ML models and 3 DL architectures under three spatial validation strategies.

Pipeline: GEE feature extraction → statistical analysis → ML/DL training → spatial prediction maps.
